name: Compliance Consistency Check
description: When architecture or plan documents are edited, verify that compliance frameworks identified in discovery are being respected

then.prompt: An architecture or plan document was just edited. Check: are the regulatory/compliance frameworks identified in the Discovery Summary being respected in this document? Look for technology choices, data flow decisions, or deployment recommendations that might conflict with the applicable compliance requirements (e.g., cloud AI with ITAR data, unencrypted storage with HIPAA data, missing audit trails with SOX requirements). If you find potential conflicts, flag them immediately.
